title: Croparium
description: Mining using hands is extremely unhealthy! This mod make resources growable!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80e5f3ffb89a06fe86a633ec1260c706578a2543.png)

Do you want to easily cultivate various resources in Minecraft just like growing crops? The Croparium mod makes it possible! It provides a brand-new way to obtain ores and all kinds of resources, allowing you to grow resources like farming crops!

~~_As is known, Mining using hands is extremely unhealthy!_~~

~~_众所周知，手挖是一种极其不健康的行为！_~~

# Planting Guide
## How to Obtain Seeds
**The crafting recipe for seeds of each resource is similar: 1 unit of the target resource + 8 corresponding embryo shards**.
- **Vanilla Plantable Resources:**

| Overworld Minerals | Nether Minerals | Biomass Resources | Ocean Resources | Sweet Resources |
|--------------------|-----------------|-------------------|-----------------|-----------------|
| ![Overworld mineral seeds recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0be087823d29ae29b8a3e915b249031ccb0129f2.png)|![Nether mineral seeds recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac967ec38d32c2727ace8754b6d3d4d8c199a515.png) | ![Biomass resourse seeds recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdd730a0bf436a62c5989a5d884ad60cc45817ed.png)|![Marine resourse seeds recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be76dab219355e39ce41fb42023f87e8ce336188.png) | ![Sweet resourse seeds recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5ca0a0d6ea0298dfb75fd43160282fae0216619.png)|
|![Growable overworld minerals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9586bb6af6913eb4e273c06e94b86c2a2f9d94f.png) | ![Growable nether minerals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcdafa18a8aef025769cfb66a291a8d241546692.png)| ![Growable biomass resourses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49edef7b422e79cb069a4054c7a971c4bcf08bf1.png)|![Growable marine resourses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c31f765d826b2bc1cdff0da0cd17dee41e5bd47e.png) |![Growable sweet resourses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b53cc4c6324e8453d4f6244ae02883424ea3d7da.png) |

- After installing compatible add-on mods, you can also plant specific resources from those mods.

## Obtaining Embryo Shards
- Hold the corresponding material and right-click a Classic Stonecutter to extract the shards. A single embryo shard of the matching type will drop upon success.
- Tutorial: [**Embryo Shard Extraction Guide**](https://github.com/litQA/Croparium/wiki/Embryo-Shard-Extraction-Guide)

## Planting and Harvesting
- **Mod crops require a specific type of "farmland" to grow— vanilla dirt farmland won’t work! Crops must be planted on dedicated farmland.**

- Embryo shards can be used to accelerate the growth of corresponding crops.
- Once crops are fully grown, you can harvest them by either breaking the plants directly or right-clicking on them.
- Tutorial: [**Crop Planting and Growth Mechanisms**](https://github.com/litQA/Croparium/wiki/Crop-Planting-and-Growth-Mechanisms)

## Reactor Core
- The Reactor Core is a powerful functional block that enables automation of crop cultivation in this mod.
- Tutorial: [**Croparium Reactor Core Usage Guide**](https://github.com/litQA/Croparium/wiki/Croparium-Reactor-Core-Usage-Guide)

# Configuration Files
- The configuration file will only be generated or read if the [**Jauml mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/jauml/versions) is installed, and it takes effect on the server side. The configuration file is located at `config/croparium`.
- The settings in the configuration file will also apply in add-on mods.
- The file is only loaded when entering a world or using the command `/croparium_config_reload`.


# Cross-Mod Expansion
Starting from version 3.0.0, the Croparium mod adopts a modular design. **The base mod does not include any cross-mod crops**—it needs to be used with corresponding expansion mods (this mod serves as a dependency).

Players can install the corresponding expansion mods as needed, with the main Croparium mod serving as the required dependency.

Some expansion mods:

[**Croparium: Confluence Overworld**](https://modrinth.com/mod/croparium-confluence)

[**Croparium: Cataclysm**](https://modrinth.com/mod/croparium-cataclysm)

[**Croparium: Twilight Forest**](https://modrinth.com/mod/croparium-the-twilight-forest)

[**Croparium: ARPHEX**](https://modrinth.com/mod/croparium-arphex)

[**Croparium: The Aether**](https://modrinth.com/mod/croparium-aether)

[**Croparium: Create**](https://modrinth.com/mod/croparium-create)

[**Croparium: Mekanism**](https://modrinth.com/mod/croparium-mekanism)

[**Croparium: Composite Materials**](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croparium-composite-material)

[**Biomes O' Plenty Legacy Reborn & Croparium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bop-legacy-reborn-croparium)

**More cross-mod content is still in development. If you have creative suggestions to share or encounter issues while using the mod, feel free to [**open an issue on GitHub**](https://github.com/litQA/Croparium/issues).**
